title: HSE Officer (NEBOSH IGC required)
summary: Lead day-to-day HSE for a 600-person cement plant. Drive zero-incident culture, lead toolbox talks, and own the ISO 45001 audit cycle.
responsibilities: Maintain the site risk register and conduct weekly walk-downs.
Lead toolbox talks and incident root-cause investigations.
Liaise with the corporate HSE function on KPI reporting.
requirements: 3+ years HSE experience in heavy industry.
Strong written English; Arabic is a plus.

title: Lead HSE Trainer (IOSH approved)
summary: Deliver IOSH Managing Safely + IOSH Working Safely cohorts to corporate clients across the GCC. Up to 30% travel.
responsibilities: Maintain centre quality records to IOSH standards.
requirements: Approved IOSH trainer status (IOSH Working/Managing Safely).

title: HSE Coordinator
summary: Site-based HSE coordinator across two active construction projects. Daily JSAs, PTW reviews, and contractor inductions.
responsibilities: Daily JSA reviews and permit-to-work approvals.
Maintain training matrix for 200+ field staff.
requirements: IOSH Working Safely (minimum); IOSH Managing Safely preferred.
